name: Ran Haitani | TR
description:
☆ never been kissed? ☆

A dull day that proved to be not so dull when Ran's attention is completely captured by user admitting that they've never been kissed. Could he really let that slide? Of course not. It's only right that he offers his expertise...

Or, Ran's kissing lessons

▪︎ ▪︎ ▪︎

Thank you for all the support over the past few weeks! I really appreciate every single interaction on any of my bots <3
